raw:
{

"judge_id": "judge_2024",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
  "R1.3": 5,
  "R1.4": 3,
  "RX.1": 5,
  "RX.3": 5,
  "RX.4": 5,
  "RX.5": 3
},
"rationale": {
  "R1.3": "The agent output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, such as specifying MAE reductions and suggesting additional baselines for comparison.",
  "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (propensity score method) but does not map against multiple works, hence scoring closer to 3.",
  "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty by pointing out areas needing more information and suggests improvements, marking confidence for each recommendation.",
  "RX.3": "The output stays within the agreed scope without drifting, covering exactly what was requested.",
  "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original draft, such as removing self-praise.",
  "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits lack annotation."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.3": 0.9,
  "R1.4": 0.8,
  "RX.1": 0.85,
  "RX.3": 0.95,
  "RX.4": 0.9,
  "RX.5": 0.75
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, such as specifying MAE reductions and suggesting additional baselines for comparison.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (propensity score method) but does not map against multiple works, hence scoring closer to 3.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty by pointing out areas needing more information and suggests improvements, marking confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope without drifting, covering exactly what was requested.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original draft, such as removing self-praise.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits lack annotation.
